reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para una parada en ruta, amplio salón de expendio de comidas, bebidas y kiosco, baños super limpios, recarga de agua para el termo gratis. Muchos medios de pago, App, efectivo, débito y crédito. Muy recomendable!!!

(Translated by Google)
A great place for a stopover, with a spacious food and drink area and kiosk, super-clean restrooms, and free water refills for your thermos. Many payment methods: app, cash, debit, and credit. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwX3U3LTN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Espacios al aire libre bien ubicados y plaza  para chicos con juegos y pasto muy tranquila y segura . Mesitas para picnic

(Translated by Google)
Well-located outdoor spaces and a very quiet and safe children's playground with grass and play equipment. Picnic tables are also available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwdklPNlBREAE

reviews.comment:
Mucha gente para cargar combustible y un poco lento el personal de playa para atender tanta demanda.

(Translated by Google)
Lots of people waiting to refuel and the beach staff were a bit slow to handle the demand.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwalBfYnRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación  ,muy concurrida . La atención de los playeros es muy buena y correcta. En  Full la atención también es buena. Lo único que podrían mejorar en la zona surtidores es el cartel que indica solo carga de camiones, es muy chiquito y mucha gente se para por equivocación  y se enojan con el playero.

(Translated by Google)
Very good station, very busy. The service from the beach attendants is very good and polite. At Full, the service is also good. The only thing they could improve in the pumping area is the sign indicating truck loading only. It's very small, and many people stop by by mistake and get angry at the beach attendants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwakozR2NREAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
